title: Glass Pitcher, Yeelua 1L Large Capacity Kettle with Removable Lid, Clear Glass Pitcher Carafe for Refrigerator, Hot Cold Water Jug, Beverage Carafe for Tea Cafe Lemonade
features: Premium Glass, Safe & Durable: Crafted from high-quality, heat-resistant borosilicate glass, this carafe withstands extreme temperatures from -20°C to 150°C.
1L Ideal Capacity: The perfect 1-liter size meets daily hydration needs without being bulky. It's ideal for a personal workspace, bedside table, small dining table.
Dual-Spout & No-Drip Design: The 304 stainless steel lid features an innovative dual-spout: one for smooth, fast pouring and the other with a filter for teas and infusions.
Multi-Purpose for All Hot & Cold Drinks: Excellent for both hot and cold beverages. Confidently use it for iced water, hand-brewed coffee, hot tea, fruit-infused water, juice, or wine.
Easy-Clean Wide Mouth: The ergonomic handle provides a secure, comfortable grip and stays cool to the touch. The wide mouth allows for easy filling with ice or fruit.
description: Specifications Color: Clear Capacity: 1L Material: glass Features 1. Chic, practical and stable shape 2. Suitable for many occasions 3. Suitable for family use, drink all day long 4. Suitable for various occasions, Christmas, wedding, Easter, Halloween, New Year, Thanksgiving, anniversary, Mother's Day, Father's Day, graduation ceremony, Valentine's Day
